privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new Rocket.Chat team from scratch. Verified that the expected target team name ('release-management'), description ('Coordinates all release activities and planning'), member to add ('agent.user'), channel to associate ('release-updates'), and team type (0 for Public) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the checks enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
